title: Add typed SubstratePhaseAssignment computed property classifying each family
description: The doctrine memory `[[substrate-apple-first-then-cross-platform-2026-05-26]]` defines selection predicates for Phase 1 and Phase 2. These currently exist as static computed properties (`phase1Bound`, `phase2Bound`). Add a typed `SubstratePhaseAssignment` enum that classifies EACH family AT BUILD TIME via a computed property on Entry. Proposed cases: `phase1RunningProduction` (apple-foundation today), `phase1Targeted` (future OS-bundled like Phi-Silica, Pixel Gemini-Nano), `phase2H22026Sovereign` (Llama, Mistral, Phi, Qwen, DeepSeek), `phase2Future` (long-horizon sovereign candidates not yet active), `hostedProductionTier` (Claude, Gemini, GPT, Codex — running today, not sovereign), `notInRoadmap` (Grok, Cohere, Nova). Add `extension AIModelFamilyOrdinalityTable.Entry { var phaseAssignment: SubstratePhaseAssignment { ... } }`. Add tests asserting each family gets the correct phase. This is the VC-slide-readable summary computed directly from the genotype.
